channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Abrupt Verdict on Arm-Qualcomm Licensing Dispute: A Blow to Arm's Future
item.description: A US District Court jury delivers a verdict in the licensing dispute between Arm and Qualcomm, leaving Arm with limited options for appeal. The jury found that Qualcomm did not breach Nuvia’s license with Arm but could not agree on whether Nuvia had breached its terms. This decision leaves room for another trial, much to Arm's dismay.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
